name: DiffusionAE
paper: Time Series Anomaly Detection using Diffusion-based Models
description: DiffusionAE is a jointly trained autoencoder and diffusion model. During training, the autoencoder reconstructs the input time series. Noise is then added on the reconstruction. Distinctly from the diffusion-only model, the network learns to denoise the corrupted reconstruction of the input instead of the corrupted original sequence, making the entire model trainable end-to-end.
